module.name: host
module.purpose: Host crate for tool execution management. session.rs implements HostSession, which connects to the agent host bind address, owns the per-connection Executor, and pumps inbound agent SessionMessage envelopes into Executor::route_session_event. HostSession exposes package_message(SessionEvent) -> SessionMessage, which the executor and execution runtimes use to wrap outbound events. The executor folder module owns host-side tool execution: Executor owns the tool registry and active execution runtimes; Tool exposes typed ToolSchema content as String via input_schema/output_schema; ExecutionRuntime runs typed ExecutionRequest input.content through the selected tool.

childModules.name: executor
childModules.purpose: Executor folder module owning tool preview and host-side tool execution. Tool exposes typed preview schema content as String, and the execution child runtime reads ExecutionRequest.input.content for tool execution.
